title: Implementar React Router per deep-linking
impact: Permet deep-linking i navegacio directa a cada modul sense canviar tab.
steps: 1. Importar BrowserRouter, Routes, Route a App.jsx,2. Definir rutes: /ops -> Ops, /brain -> Brain, /lab -> Lab,3. Substituir useState tab switching per navegacio de rutes,4. Mantenir Dock com a navegacio
